category_title: Students exhibiting physical aggression, bullying, and disrespect toward authority
scenario_title: Physical aggression and extreme misbehavior during a classroom conflict
minimal_context: The students are supposed to be completing an English assignment at their desks.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit at your desks and begin the English assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am not doing this. I can't work because he is bothering me again.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to ignore him and just focus on your own work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yelling across the desks) Shut up! You are always insulting me!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone needs to calm down and be quiet right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Lunges at the other student) I said shut up! (The students get into a physical fight, knocking over seats and creating complete chaos in the classroom)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please sit at your desks and begin the English assignment.

STUDENT: I am not doing this. I can't work because he is bothering me again.

TUTOR: Try to ignore him and just focus on your own work.

STUDENT: (Yelling across the desks) Shut up! You are always insulting me!

TUTOR: Everyone needs to calm down and be quiet right now.

STUDENT: (Lunges at the other student) I said shut up! (The students get into a physical fight, knocking over seats and creating complete chaos in the classroom)

task.content: General classroom instruction and EFL lesson

context.environment: Secondary school classroom in chaos with seats and desks
context.social_setting: Group of students in a secondary school setting

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When a student was having conflicts with another boy who was bothering him, and the incident was getting out of control
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Students got into a fight in class, yelling at each other, physical aggression, insulting or bullying other students, and got hold of the police officer's gun from the top of a desk
related_quotes: they had taken the gun just for fun

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Not showing any progress or interest in class, engaging in major acts of misbehavior such as physical aggression and bullying
